tasks.label: Give written notice to landlord/agent (notice period must end on the last day of a rent period)
Request checkout expectations
tasks.dueText: Checkout process, key return method, cleaning expectations, garden expectations, final inspection date & time

tasks.label: Book removals or van hire / rental
Set up Royal Mail post redirection (valid for 3–12 months)
Book end-of-tenancy professional cleaning if required by agreement (keep receipt)
Book professional carpet cleaning if required by agreement (keep receipt)
Book professional pet upholstery cleaning if required by agreement (keep receipt)
Notify gas, electricity, and water suppliers of leaving date
Notify broadband provider: cancel, transfer, or take connectivity with you
Notify contents insurance: cancel, transfer, or update
Notify TV Licence of move
Notify council tax of leaving date and request final bill
Replace dead lightbulbs with same type/wattage as inventory
Mow lawn, weed, trim hedges if garden is your responsibility
Repair minor damage permitted by agreement (filler, touch-up paint matched to existing)
Deep clean oven, hob, extractor fan, and grill
Defrost and clean fridge and freezer (allow 24 hours)
Clean washing machine drum, seal, detergent drawer, and filter
Clean dishwasher filter and run empty hot cycle with cleaner
Descale showerhead, taps, kettle, and limescale on tiles
Bleach toilets including under the rim and behind the seat
Clean grout and silicone seals in bathrooms and kitchen if mouldy
Wipe skirting boards, door frames, light switches, and sockets
Clean inside and outside of all windows and window tracks
Vacuum and mop every floor including under furniture and behind appliances
Remove all picture hooks and fill holes if agreement requires
Empty and clean all bins, arrange for large rubbish collection by the council or a charity
Take date-stamped photos and/or video of every empty room, cupboard, and appliance
Photograph final meter readings (gas, electricity, heating, water)
tasks.dueText: Ensure that meter serial numbers are visible

tasks.label: Return all keys & fobs: front, back, windows, mailbox, communal, fob, bin store, parking, garage
Switch off power at consumer unit only if instructed
Conduct check-out inventory inspection with landlord/agent if possible; get it emailed or signed
Secure property on your final exit (closed windows, locked doors, heating off, non-essential appliances off, lights off)
Submit final meter readings to suppliers the same day
Request deposit return in writing referencing the protection scheme
tasks.dueText: Landlord must respond within 10 days of agreement

tasks.label: If deposit dispute, raise with the scheme's free adjudication service directly
Pay final utility bills and only then cancel direct debits
tasks.dueText: Cancelling any outstanding direct debits first risks credit issues

tasks.label: Confirm council tax account closed and final bill received
Update all banks, building societies, mortgage lenders, and credit cards of new address
Update ISA, investment, exchange, and brokerage accounts of new address
Update life insurance, critical illness, and income protection of new address
Update solicitor, accountant, and will/executor records of new address
Update DVLA driving licence address (free; £1000 fine if not done)
Update DVLA V5C vehicle log book
Update vehicle insurance address
Update Blue Badge permit address
Update workplace and personal pension providers of new address
Notify HMRC (Income Tax, National Insurance, Child Benefit, State Pension) of address change
Update Companies House registered office and director's service address if running a business
Update Disclosure and Barring Service (DBS) Update Service
Update Student Finance address if a student
Update vet records and microchip database (Petlog/Identibase) if you have pets
Update Gift Aid declarations with charities of new address
Update PayPal, Amazon, eBay and other frequently used online retailer default shipping addresses
Update gym and other subscription services (e.g. mobile provider) of new address
Check no post is still arriving for you at the old address after 3 months
Keep tenancy agreement, inventory, photos, and correspondence for at least 6 years
Reject deductions for fair wear and tear
tasks.dueText: Landlord must prove damage beyond normal use

tasks.label: Reject 'betterment' deductions
tasks.dueText: Landlord cannot charge new-for-old on used items -- replacement must be like-for-like

tasks.label: Reference the move-in inventory and your ammendments for any disputes
tasks.dueText: Note if damage was already present and documented or if their provided iventory has poor quality images that does not prove that the damage didn't already exist
